prompt: A clean editorial fashion collage on a light gray-white background with a thin black rectangular border, styled like a minimalist magazine outfit board. Center the outfit as a flat lay style composition with 5 visible fashion items: a bright crimson red cropped zip-front jacket with a pointed collar and elastic hem placed slightly left and layered on top; underneath it, a fitted white long-sleeve crew-neck knit top visible at the shoulders and sleeves; below, a voluminous mid-calf A-line skirt in off-white with evenly spaced large black polka dots; at lower left, a structured small black handbag with short top handles and a subtle glossy crocodile texture; at lower right, one pair of black square-toe Mary Jane flats with wide straps and silver grommet-ring hardware. Add oversized very pale gray background typography reading MANGO stretched large across the middle behind the clothing. Place smaller black fashion-brand wordmarks around the layout: MANGO near the upper right of the outfit, "Stradivarius" near the handbag and again near the shoes, and "DOLCE & GABBANA" at the lower left near the skirt hem. The composition should feel balanced, chic, and contemporary, with soft studio lighting, no shadows or only faint soft shadows, crisp cutout edges, and a polished social-media fashion moodboard aesthetic.
